title: NextEra takes $800 million charge for WV-VA Mountain Valley natgas pipe

title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of NextEra Energy, Inc. - NEE
text: New York, New York--(Newsfile Corp. - February 2, 2022) - Pomerantz LLP is investigating claims on behalf of investors of NextEra Energy, Inc. ("NextEra" or the "Company") (NYSE: NEE). Such investors are advised to contact Robert S.
